subcodes.first_line: Verily the thunder hath rumbled and the howling of winds hath risen, and He Who splitteth the dawn, in this winter, doth command His Pen [3.5s]... ...Say: We have set ablaze the Fire of Utterance in the contingent world, and it is not among the elements which were explained to you and which ye know
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد دمدم الرعد و ارتفع هزیز الاریاح و فالق الاصباح فی هذا الشتاء یامر قلمه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of words; of speech, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
